name: memograph
description: Graph-based memory system for LLMs with intelligent retrieval
author: Indirakumar

vault.description: Path to your MemoGraph vault directory

embedding_provider.description: Embedding provider for semantic search (sentence-transformers, openai, ollama, or none)

enable_gam.description: Enable Graph Attention Memory (GAM) for enhanced retrieval

autonomous_mode.description: Enable autonomous memory capture during conversations

tools.name: search_vault
tools.description: Search memories using semantic or keyword search with configurable filters

tools.name: query_with_context
tools.description: Retrieve relevant context for a question with token compression for LLM prompts

tools.name: create_memory
tools.description: Create a new memory in the vault with title, content, tags, and type

tools.name: import_document
tools.description: Import TXT or MD documents into the vault, preserving formatting and metadata

tools.name: bulk_create
tools.description: Create multiple memories in a single operation for efficient batch imports

tools.name: list_memories
tools.description: List memories with optional filters (tags, type, date range)

tools.name: get_memory
tools.description: Get full content and metadata of a specific memory by title

tools.name: get_vault_info
tools.description: Get information about the configured vault (path, size, configuration)

tools.name: update_memory
tools.description: Update an existing memory's content, tags, or metadata

tools.name: delete_memory
tools.description: Delete a memory from the vault permanently

tools.name: get_vault_stats
tools.description: Get vault statistics and analytics (memory count, tags, types, connections)

tools.name: list_available_tools
tools.description: List all available MCP tools with descriptions and categories

tools.name: relate_memories
tools.description: Create a bidirectional graph link between two memories for enhanced traversal

tools.name: search_by_graph
tools.description: Traverse connected memories from a starting point using BFS with configurable depth

tools.name: find_path
tools.description: Find the shortest graph path between two memories using BFS

tools.name: auto_hook_query
tools.description: Autonomous hook that processes user queries to capture relevant context

tools.name: auto_hook_response
tools.description: Autonomous hook that processes AI responses to extract and store insights

tools.name: configure_autonomous_mode
tools.description: Configure autonomous behavior settings (enable/disable, filters, thresholds)

tools.name: get_autonomous_config
tools.description: Get current autonomous behavior settings and status
